allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\) { Write-Output "Git found at Program Files" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\) { Write-Output "Git found at LocalAppData" }; if \(Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "Scoop available" }; if \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "Winget available" }; if \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "Choco available" })
